title: Intelligence Is Not the Bottleneck: Validating an LLM First-Pass Manuscript Score Against Peer-Review Outcomes — analysis code and data
description: Reproducible analysis code, pre-registration, de-identified scored data, and the LaTeX manuscript for a pre-registered study validating an automated LLM manuscript-scoring system (AIPR) against the public peer-review outcomes of ICLR 2026 on OpenReview (decision tier and mean reviewer rating). A single command regenerates every figure, table, and statistic in the paper from the released two-table data contract. The proprietary manuscript-to-score function is not included; it is treated as a fixed black box and audited through its outputs. Derived outcome and rating metadata are reproduced from the public OpenReview record under CC BY 4.0; manuscript PDFs and full review texts are not redistributed.
